race.comment: BARE TO WITNESS (1) has returned in good shape this preparation. Opened with a third at Pakenham two starts back then scored as public elect last time out here. Jack Hill scored on him last time and retains the ride. Ideally placed and can make it two on the bounce SUPREME THUNDER (4) has been threatening throughout this campaign but continues to leave himself with too much to do. Can snap his drought with Opperman reuniting. RATNARAJ (3) is building nicely into this campaign and is still relatively lightly raced. Got home nicely into fourth third-up at Edenhope and will be further improved stepping out to 1200m. Don't take lightly. FOREVER WAITING (2) best of the rest.
